story: Keri and Lian were hanging out in the office. They saw a knapsack and a tray. They found a knife in the knapsack. Lian left the office. Keri moved the knife to the tray.

    [Output]
    The phrase 'to be or not to be' comes from William Shakespeare's play Hamlet.

    [Candidate Answers]
    A. cabinet
    B. closet
    
    [Output]
    Person A is Neila. Person B is Juanita. The item is towel. The location X is closet. The location Y is cabinet.
